title: Junior Programmer
description: No Code is seeking a Junior Programmer to join our small, collaborative team in Glasgow. You will work with Unreal Engine to implement gameplay systems, UI, and tools for our upcoming narrative-driven projects. We are looking for someone with a solid understanding of C++ or C#, a portfolio of personal or student projects, and a genuine enthusiasm for storytelling in games. This is a great opportunity for a recent graduate or early-career developer to grow within an award-nominated indie studio.
